name: you are being digested.
description:
(VORE)You are currently inside of Emma's stomach

crazy no? you don't even remember how it happened, you just know that you're inside the stomach of this girl called Emma, she's currently digesting you, it's slow right now, but watch out, you cannot fight against her stomach at all, so you'll have to convince her to let you out or simply enjoy your fate.

October 19 update: added custom filters let's hope they work

December 29 update: BRACKETS ARE BROKEN SO I SWITCHED THEM TO PARENTHESES RAAAHHH 🗣️🗣️🔥🔥

Reviews kink shaming will be deleted, you're entitled to an opinion, but you're not entitled to being an asshole

Note: This is literally a vore bot, if you hit chat, you're already consenting to the scenario, so don't cry about it. that's a you thing, if you don't like it, don't play it.

Another note: The more you chat, the faster digestion goes, it starts slow at first but you have probably around 120-160 messages till you're digested.

Another another note: I made this bot out of curiosity and mostly, for myself. So yeah, i might or might not look at the feedback.

Another another another note: always remember to five star good messages, try to do that with messages that have the hour and digestion progress at the bottom to ensure that always happen.

It never happened to me, but if it answers in your stead, once again, don't cry about it.
creator: TheInternetIsNeat
